title: Five Days Faculty Development Programme on Recent Advances in Electrical, Electronics & Communication Engineering
content: Five Days Faculty Development Programme on Recent Advances Event Date: 6th - 10th May 2024 This programme is designed to provide an exposure to the fundamentals and recent advances in electrical, electronics & communication engineering. During this FDP, esteemed academicians, and industry experts discussed the current and future scope in the aforementioned field. This programme provided state of the art research ideas and recent technological advances in respective domains to the participants. Course Contents: - RF Integrated Circuits: Design Challenges & Opportunities - Effect of Time Delay in Practical Systems - Artificial Intelligence-enabled Cyber Physical Systems - Electrical Motors and its Control in the Electrical Vehicles - Molecular Communication as a New Paradigm: From Novice to Implementation - Meta Learning for Medical Images - Leveraging Bayesian Filtering Methods for State and Parameter Estimation of Systems - SiGe HBT Devices Operating under Cryogenic Temperatures for High-Speed Electronics Applications - Lifestyle Management for Busy Professionals Eligibility for Participants: Faculties of various Universities/Institutions, Industry Personnels, Scientists and Engineers from research and development organizations, UG, PG, and Ph. D scholars can apply for this programme. The interested candidates need to apply online through Google form. How to Apply: For the registration, please fill the Google form. The link for the Google form is given below- Google Form Link- https://forms.gle/6SW5uZcC8Ar7hrXw9 Note: - E-certificate will be issued to participants after completion of this programme. - There is no registration fee for this program. List of Esteemed Professors and Industry Experts: - Dr. Sandeep Kumar Amera, JNU, New Delhi - Dr. Vipin Chandra Pal, NIT Silchar - Dr. Dipayan Guha, MNNIT, Allahabad - Dr. Himanshu Mishra, IIT Mandi - Dr. S P Singh, Symbiosis University - Dr. Rishav Singh, IIT Patna - Dr. Rahul Bansal, IIT Kanpur - Dr. Dinesh Gupta, Senior Research Consultant, Penguin CRM - Mr. Parit Agarwal, Senior Manager, Morgan Stanley Organizing Committee: Chief Patrons - Mr. Suneel Galgotia, Chancellor, Galgotias University - Dr. Dhruv Galgotia, CEO Operations Galgotias University - Ms. Aradhana Galgotia, Director Operations Galgotias University Patrons - Prof. K. Mallikharjuna Babu, Vice Chancellor, Galgotias University - Prof. Avadhesh Kumar, Pro Vice-Chancellor, Galgotias University - Prof. Meenakshi Awasthi, Head (DEECE) Convenors - Dr. Komal Agrawal, Assistant Professor, DEECE - Dr. Prabhakar Agarwal, Assistant Professor, DEECE Coordinators - Dr. Kumar Prashant, Assistant Professor, DEECE - Dr. Neeraj Jain, Assistant Professor, DEECE Technical Advisory Committee - Prof. Usha Chauhan - Prof. Seema Garg - Dr. Mohammad Rashid Ansari - Dr. Sheetla Prasad - Dr. Dinesh Singh - Dr. Amit Arora Mentor Name – Dr. Komal Agrawal, Dr. Prabhakar Agarwal, Dr. Kumar Prashant, Dr. Neeraj Jain Assistant Professor(s), DEECE Department Name – Department of Electrical, Electronics & Communication Engineering Related Goal
